rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §28.0043 governs curriculum restrictions on sexual orientation and gender identity instruction. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 28.0043. RESTRICTION ON INSTRUCTION REGARDING SEXUAL ORIENTATION AND GENDER IDENTITY.
_note: No overlap between proposed tax exemption change and this education curriculum statute.
